user.title: Add LX OpenSubsonic
user.description: Configure an OpenSubsonic bridge for Music Assistant online music search and playback.

data_description.username: Username used by Music Assistant to connect. Default: admin
data_description.password: Password used by Music Assistant to connect. Default: password
data_description.music_source_js_url: Music source script URL used to resolve playback links.
data_description.preferred_quality: Preferred playback quality, with automatic fallback.
data_description.playlist_song_virtual_album: Default off. Only affects online-search playlists. Helps song detail and now-playing covers.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure LX OpenSubsonic
reconfigure.description: Update account, search source, music source URL and quality settings.

data_description.username: Username used by Music Assistant to connect.
data_description.password: Password used by Music Assistant to connect.
data_description.music_source_js_url: Music source script URL used to resolve playback links.
data_description.preferred_quality: Preferred playback quality, with automatic fallback.
data_description.playlist_song_virtual_album: Default off. Only affects online-search playlists. Helps song detail and now-playing covers.

init.title: LX OpenSubsonic options
init.description: Changes reload automatically. No reinstall needed.
